warnings.detail: features_v04_1.parquet exists (399MB, 1,234,580 rows × 156 columns, 476 tickers)
2025 factor coverage: 77.3%, 2026: 79.7%. Below 80% threshold for individual years.
2016 coverage only 58.9% - early data sparse
17 columns with >30% missing: vwap(57%), analyst_covered(43%), eps_dispersion(72%), qoq factors(71%), a_eps_revision(35%)
r_priceToEarningsRatio: min=-89800, max=93170 (extreme). m_returnOnEquity: min=-100.7. g_revenueGrowth: max=377.9. Rank-based approach mitigates, but verify flip factors are correct.
Fundamental factor coverage 2025: 92.8%, 2026: 92.8% (acceptable)
us_prices_daily.parquet exists (42MB)
8 factor groups defined: fund_ratio(20), fund_metric(19), fund_growth(15), analyst(4), balance(4), cashflow(4), income(6), qoq(4). Total 76 PIT factors.
Sub-weights match config: fund_growth=0.60, analyst=0.25, income=0.15. Sum=1.0 ✓
Percentile rank [0,1] applied per date. Flip factors defined for 22 inverse indicators (debt, valuation, etc).
AAPL PE ratio changes at quarterly earnings dates (2016-10-27, 2017-02-02, etc). Growth factors have 94.6% coverage. No evidence of future data in factor computation.
ret1 is NaN on first day (correctly lagged). Technical indicators use historical data. Fundamental factors change only at earnings dates.
Combo factors (log_metric, sqrt_ratio, etc) computed from ranked values [0,1], so log/sqrt are safe. quality_composite, safety_composite use correct sub-group weights.

blockers.detail: Rank Inversion 63.2% (12/19 windows) is NOT statistically significant. Binomial test p-value=0.18 (H0: pass_rate=50%). Cannot reject null hypothesis at 5% or 10% level. The 63.2% could be random chance.
Average spread (Top5% - Bottom20%) = 0.00157 (0.16%). Directionally correct but extremely weak. For comparison, V0.3.1 spread was 2-3x larger.
blockers.evidence: avg_spread=0.00157 across 19 windows. 7 windows have negative spread.

warnings.detail: Only 15/19 WF windows valid. 4 windows failed (W3-W6, 2018-2019) due to growth_composite coverage <80%. Model effectively validated only on 2020-2026 data.
WF Sharpe 2.007 is within reasonable range. No window has Sharpe >10. Range: 0.056 to 4.033. Median: 2.093.
Strategy beats baseline in only 9/15 windows (60%). In 6 windows, baseline is better.
warnings.evidence: Mean strategy Sharpe=2.007, mean baseline=1.551. Baseline wins in W2, W10, W13, W15, W17, W18.

warnings.detail: Degradation 40.8% (early=2.756, recent=1.633). Below 50% WARN threshold and 75% FAIL threshold.
2 windows have Sharpe >3 (W2=4.033, W9=3.251) - check for bull market bias. 2 windows have Sharpe <0.5 (W11=0.056, W17=0.345) - near-zero alpha.
warnings.evidence: W2 (2017H2): bull market. W9 (2021H1): post-COVID rally. W11 (2022H1): bear market. W17 (2025H1): volatile.

warnings.detail: Main weights: fund_ratio=0.70, growth_composite=0.30. Sum=1.0 ✓. growth_composite sub-weights: 0.60+0.25+0.15=1.0 ✓
Output JSON contains: metadata, rank_inversion_test, walk_forward_result, walk_forward_windows, sharpe_degradation, summary. All fields present.
Script uses BacktestEngine from backtest_engine.py. No custom backtest logic. Engine has data quality gates (min_coverage=0.8).
Scores = Σ(weight_i × group_rank_i). Cross-sectional percentile ranking ensures scores in [0,1]. Top-N selection by score.
Parquet loads correctly. 156 columns match factor group definitions. Technical + fundamental + growth + analyst + balance + cashflow + income + qoq factors all present.
Ranks computed from features. Factor groups defined in script match parquet columns. Combo factors computed from group ranks.
Output weights (fund_ratio=0.70, growth_composite=0.30) match script weights. growth_composite sub-weights match metadata.

RI test uses 19 windows (all data). WF test also starts with 19 windows but 4 fail. RI test does NOT filter by data quality - it runs on 2018-2019 windows where growth_composite coverage is <80%. This means RI includes windows where the model couldn't even run WF.
warnings.evidence: RI windows 3-6 overlap with failed WF windows. RI pass_rate might be inflated by easy windows in low-coverage periods.

warnings.detail: No evidence of data leakage. PIT factors change only at earnings dates. Technical indicators are properly lagged. Cross-sectional ranking is per-date (no future info). BacktestEngine has data quality gates.

overall_verdict.summary: V0.4.1 Optimized passes 3/5 layers cleanly. Layer 1 (Data) has warnings but no blockers. Layer 3 (Model) has 1 blocker: Rank Inversion 63.2% is not statistically significant (p=0.18). This means the model's directional superiority over random is not proven. The WF Sharpe 2.007 is credible but model is only validated on 2020-2026 (11 years, not full 10-year backtest).
overall_verdict.recommendation: DEPLOY WITH CAVEAT: The Rank Inversion result is not statistically significant. The model may work in practice (63.2% directionally correct across 19 windows) but cannot be claimed as 'proven' with statistical confidence. Consider: (1) expanding universe to increase statistical power, (2) running longer WF windows, (3) comparing with V0.3.1 on identical test period.
